title: Exercises: Security and Compliance for Quantum Applications

exercises.title: Implement Secure Credential Rotation
exercises.description: Build a credential rotation system with zero-downtime transitions.
tasks: Implement automatic credential rotation on a configurable schedule
Create a grace period during which both old and new credentials work
Add notifications when credentials are about to expire
Implement emergency credential revocation
Generate audit events for all credential lifecycle operations
exercises.expectedOutput: SecureCredentialManager with rotation, grace periods, and audit integration
hints: Grace periods prevent service interruption during rotation
Consider notifying 7 days, 3 days, and 1 day before expiration
Revocation should be immediate and logged

exercises.title: Build Circuit Sanitizer
exercises.description: Create a comprehensive circuit sanitizer that prevents various injection attacks.
tasks: Detect and reject circuits with suspicious gate sequences
Implement maximum resource limits (qubits, gates, depth, shots)
Add pattern detection for known malicious circuit patterns
Create a sandboxed validation mode for untrusted circuits
Generate security alerts for blocked circuits
exercises.expectedOutput: CircuitSanitizer with attack detection and resource limiting
hints: Consider circuits that might cause excessive resource usage
Some gate sequences might be designed to extract calibration data
Log blocked circuits for security analysis

exercises.title: Design Compliance Evidence System
exercises.description: Design a system for automatically collecting compliance evidence.
tasks: Map quantum operations to relevant compliance controls
Design automatic evidence collection for SOC2 and HIPAA
Create evidence storage with integrity verification
Build a compliance dashboard showing control status
Generate audit-ready evidence packages
exercises.expectedOutput: ComplianceEvidenceSystem design document with implementation plan
hints: Different frameworks require different types of evidence
Automated evidence is more reliable than manual collection
Evidence should be collected in real-time, not just at audit time

exercises.title: Implement Data Classification Pipeline
exercises.description: Build an automated data classification pipeline for quantum workloads.
tasks: Create rules for automatic classification based on circuit content
Implement classification inheritance from user organization policies
Add manual classification override with approval workflow
Create alerts when high-sensitivity data is detected
Generate classification reports for compliance
exercises.expectedOutput: DataClassificationPipeline with automatic and manual classification
hints: Consider what circuit features indicate sensitive data
User organization may have default classification requirements
Manual overrides should require justification and approval
